uses: Ammodenia peploides, also known as the sand vetch, has been utilized in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits. The plant's roots and leaves are said to possess anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate symptoms associated with various conditions. Additionally, Ammodenia peploides is believed to possess antimicrobial properties, which could aid in the treatment of infections.
